faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about AIO Indicator

items.q1: What is AIO Indicator and how does it work?
items.a1: AIO (All In One) Indicator is a comprehensive TradingView price action indicator that combines time and price analysis tools. It includes market structure detection, sessions & STD, price levels, magic bars, trendlines, breakout predictions, and many more features. The indicator works on all TradingView markets including forex, stocks, crypto, commodities, and indices.
items.q2: What's the difference between VIP and Premium plans?
items.a2:
Premium Plans include the core AIO Price Action indicator with 14 powerful tools plus free indicators. Perfect for traders focused on price action and time analysis.

VIP Plans include everything in Premium PLUS 11 advanced institutional-grade indicators: Top Bottom Strategy, Supply & Demand Zones, Top Bottom Confidence, Dow Theory, Advanced Trendlines with TPO Liquidity, Advanced Market Structure with Smart Money Detection, Banker Momentum Volatility, Prediction Market Simulator, Perps Flow Positioning (AIO PFP), Seesaw Trailing Strategy, and Key Volume Pro.
items.a3: No, AIO indicators do not repaint. All signals and levels are calculated in real-time and remain fixed once formed. This is crucial for reliable back-testing and live trading. You can trust the signals you see on your chart.
items.q4: Can I use these indicators on lower timeframes like 1-minute or 5-minute?
items.a4: Yes! AIO indicators work on all timeframes from 15-second charts up to monthly charts. They're optimized for scalping, day trading, swing trading, and position trading. The indicators automatically adjust calculations based on the selected timeframe.
items.q5: How do I get access after payment?
items.a5: After completing your payment via PayPal, please send your TradingView username to us via Telegram (@nguyenthl) or email. We will grant you access to the indicators within 24 hours (usually much faster). You'll receive an invitation in your TradingView account which you need to accept.
items.q6: Do you offer a free trial?
items.a6: Yes! We offer a 5-day free trial so you can test all features before committing. Simply contact us on Telegram (@nguyenthl) or send an email to tranholenguyen@gmail.com with your TradingView username to request trial access.
items.q7: What happens if I see 'Internal server study error'?
items.a7: This error typically occurs when you've had the TradingView tab open for many hours or made many setting changes. Simply close the current TradingView tab and open a new one. The error will disappear and everything will work fine. This is a TradingView platform limitation, not an indicator issue.
items.q8: Are updates included in my subscription?
items.a8: Yes! All updates and new features are included free of charge during your subscription period. We regularly update the indicators based on user feedback and market conditions. Update notifications are sent via our Telegram channel.

terminal.hero_subtitle: Stop wasting seconds on Binance's clunky interface. AIO Terminal gives you one-click Long/Short at last price, Smart TP/SL monitoring, Trailing Stop, and instant Close All — all in a single, customisable dashboard.
terminal.pain_subtitle: Every trader using Binance natively has felt these frustrations. Here's why they cost you real money.
terminal.pain_1_desc: Select symbol, choose side, set leverage, enter size, configure TP, configure SL, confirm — by the time you're done the price has moved 0.3%.
terminal.pain_2_desc: Binance logs you out during live positions. Scrambling to re-authenticate while price is moving is a nightmare that has wiped traders' accounts.
terminal.pain_3_desc: MARKET taker fee = 0.05% vs LIMIT maker fee = 0.02%. On a $10,000 trade that's $4 vs $2 every single entry. Multiply by 10 trades a day = $20/day in extra fees.
terminal.pain_4_desc: When news hits and you need to flatten everything NOW, clicking through each position individually on Binance wastes critical seconds. Markets don't wait.
terminal.pain_5_desc: Every new order means re-entering your risk parameters from scratch. No persistence, no templates. It breaks your workflow and invites costly input errors.
terminal.pain_cta_title: AIO Terminal Solves All of This
terminal.pain_cta_desc: Built by a trader who hit every one of these walls. One tool, one dashboard, everything remembered, one click to execute.
terminal.features_title: Everything You Need in One Terminal
terminal.features_subtitle: Seven specialised order tabs. Every setting saved automatically. Switch between any tab in one click.
terminal.feat_1_title: Long Order — Limit at Last Price
terminal.feat_1_desc: Opens a LONG limit order at the current last price, achieving near-100% fill rate at maker fee (half the cost of market orders).
terminal.feat_2_title: Short Order — Limit at Last Price
terminal.feat_2_desc: Same speed advantage for shorts. One click, correct side, correct leverage, your persisted TP/SL settings applied instantly.
terminal.feat_3_desc: Background engine that monitors your positions and auto-moves SL to breakeven once TP1 is hit. Works while you trade other positions.
terminal.feat_4_desc: Set a trailing stop that activates at a price trigger and trails dynamically. Lock in profits without manually moving stops.
terminal.feat_5_title: One-Click Close / Cancel All or Selected Positions
terminal.feat_5_desc: Flatten all open positions or cancel all open orders in seconds — not minutes. Essential when news moves the market instantly.
terminal.feat_6_title: TP/SL in Price, Range, or % Mode
terminal.feat_6_desc: Set your exit by absolute price, fixed distance from entry, or percentage — whichever matches your trading style. Or set later with one click from the TP/SL tab.
terminal.feat_7_desc: Arrange your tabs in any order. All your parameters — symbol, leverage, size, TP/SL — are remembered across sessions. Never re-enter your setup again.

terminal.vip_banner_note: No credit card required for trial • Cancel anytime • 24/7 support
terminal.faq_q1: What is AIO Terminal and how do I get access?
terminal.faq_a1: AIO Terminal is a web-based order management dashboard for Binance USDT-M Futures, built for speed and simplicity. Access is included free with any VIP plan subscription. After subscribing or starting your free trial, contact us on Telegram (@nguyenthl) to receive setup instructions.
terminal.faq_q2: Is my Binance API key safe? Does AIO Terminal store my password?
terminal.faq_a2: AIO Terminal only uses your Binance API key — never your account password. Your credentials are encrypted and stored securely on our server — never in plain text, never exposed to third parties.
terminal.faq_q3: What Binance markets does it support?
terminal.faq_a3: Currently AIO Terminal supports Binance USDT-M Perpetual Futures. Support for additional markets and exchanges (Spot, Binance Coin-M, other exchanges) is planned for future releases.
terminal.faq_q4: How is limit at last price different from a market order?
terminal.faq_a4: AIO Terminal places a LIMIT order at the current last traded price. Because you're a maker not a taker, Binance charges 0.02% instead of 0.05%. The fill rate is near 100% because the order is placed at the market price — but you pay maker fees. On active symbols this fills virtually instantly.
terminal.faq_a5: AIO Terminal is fully browser-based — no installation required. It works on any modern browser across macOS, Windows, and Linux. Just open the terminal URL, log in, and start trading.
terminal.faq_q6: Is AIO Terminal available on testnet?
terminal.faq_a6: Yes! AIO Terminal defaults to Binance testnet so you can test all features without risking real funds. Switch to mainnet only when you're confident.
terminal.blog_cta_desc: Deep-dive articles on getting the most out of AIO Terminal and why exchange-native interfaces are costing you money.
